Perfect! Follow these steps ji --- *STEP 1 — Go to your Repository* Click on *"sandhu-enterprises"* (top left me dikh raha hai) --- *STEP 2 — Click "Add file"* Repository page pe jaoge to ek green button *"Code"* dikhe ga aur uske paas *"Add file"* button hoga Click karo *"Add file"* → phir *"Upload files"* select karo --- *STEP 3 — Upload your HTML file*
  • Apne computer me jaao jahan tumne *sandhu-enterprises.html* download ki thi
  • Us file ka naam *badlo* → index.html kar do
  • Phir us file ko *drag and drop* karo GitHub ke upload box me
 --- *STEP 4 — Commit the file* Neeche ek box hoga — *"Commit changes"* Wahan likha hoga "Add files via upload" — waise hi rehne do Bas green button *"Commit changes"* click karo ✅ --- *STEP 5 — File upload h…
